name: SaaS Autopilot - Competitor Price Monitor Blueprint
description: A Make.com-style blueprint for monitoring competitor pricing pages, logging changes, and creating an alert for pricing review.
disclaimer: Respect website terms, robots.txt, rate limits, and applicable law. This template is for legitimate monitoring of public pricing pages.

inputs.prompt: Extract the visible plan names, prices, billing terms, and feature limits from this pricing page HTML. Return strict JSON. If uncertain, mark field as unknown. HTML: {{2.body}}

body.text: Pricing snapshot captured. Review the latest row before making pricing decisions.

qa_checks: Unknown fields are labeled unknown rather than guessed.
Snapshot is logged with timestamp and source URL.
Alert goes to the correct review channel.
No automated pricing changes happen without human approval.
